name: Sluggish Mutation (Slug TF)
description:
A bite begins to mutate a poor spacefarer into a terrible monster...

This bot contains:

  • Slug Transformation (TF)

  • Weight Gain

  • Slime

Hope this is a fun setting for folks. This is more horror adjacent than really titillating, but if your a freak like me it really can be!

I do my best to stop bots from talking for you, but due to shifting quality of JLLM and other factors, please forgive the fact this bot may do that often. You can edit the post or reroll them to try and circumvent those issues.
creator: Radabada
